transcript:
Sam: Thanks for the time, Lena. What are the must-haves for you to move forward?
Lena: Honestly it comes down to compliance. We're in financial services, so we need SOC2, and we need data to stay in-region - EU data can't leave the EU. Until I have clear answers there, I can't take this to my leadership.
Sam: Understood, that's a common requirement for us. I'll get you the compliance documentation. On timing and budget - any sense of those yet?
Lena: It's early. I don't have a budget number yet and I won't until I've cleared the compliance hurdle. Let's not put a dollar figure on it prematurely.
Sam: Completely fair. So the next step is the compliance packet - SOC2 plus a data-residency statement covering EU in-region storage. I'll send that this week.
Lena: Yes, that's the right next step.
Sam: Done. I'll have it to you by Thursday.
